svg.text: Claude Code Pipeline – Spec → Build → Review: End-to-End Delivery
A quality-focused loop with self-scoring, specialist builds, and ≤3 review cycles.
/delegate Wrap-Up – full-spec review + documentation drift-audit – before returning control

💬 Interview: clarify requirements • 📋 Delegate: create / refine spec • ◇ Decision Gate: quality checkpoint • 📦 Build: implement via specialists • 🛡️ Spec Coverage: map every requirement • 🔄 Review Loop: improve until approved

Sources: commands/spec.md · commands/build.md · commands/delegate.md · skills/self-scoring-loop/SKILL.md · skills/code-scoring-loop/SKILL.md · hooks/stop-peer-review-gate.ps1 · hooks/record-subagent-run.ps1 — Generated: 2026-07-21
